---
title: bash
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = FALSE
)
```

#### change directory

```{sh}
pwd
cd ~ && pwd
cd -
cd ~/Downloads && pwd
cd -
cd ../ && pwd
cd -
```

#### copy to clipboard

```{sh}
pbcopy < ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub
```

#### get help

```{sh}
mkdir -help
```

#### list files

```{sh}
ls -al
```

* `-l` print list with extra info
* `-a` include hidden files

#### make a directory

```{sh}
mkdir -p new_dir/new_subdir
cd !$ && pwd
```

#### make a file

```{sh}
touch temp.txt
echo "hello" > temp.txt
cat temp.txt
```

#### make a variable

```{sh}
DIR=Downloads
echo $DIR
cd ~/$DIR && pwd
cd -
```

#### print the tail of a file

```{sh}
tail -f path_to_file
```
